description:
Blazing-fast Claude in your terminal — a C++26 alternative to claude-code.

agentty is a native C++26 terminal coding agent and a drop-in alternative to claude-code. A single static binary with sub-millisecond cold start, sandboxed by default, and one-command SSH air-gap. No Node, Python, or Electron. Signs in with your Claude Pro/Max subscription or an ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.
See CHANGELOG.md.
